mapper.insert: INSERT INTO financial_product (product_category, product_name, base_interest_rate, max_interest_rate, min_duration_months, max_duration_months, min_amount, max_amount, description, is_active) VALUES (#{product.productCategory}, #{product.productName}, #{product.baseInterestRate}, #{product.maxInterestRate}, #{product.minDurationMonths}, #{product.maxDurationMonths}, #{product.minAmount}, #{product.maxAmount}, #{product.description}, #{product.isActive})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM financial_product WHERE is_active = TRUE
AND product_category = #{category}

SELECT product_id AS productId, product_category AS productCategory, product_name AS productName, base_interest_rate AS baseInterestRate, max_interest_rate AS maxInterestRate, min_duration_months AS minDurationMonths, max_duration_months AS maxDurationMonths, min_amount AS minAmount, max_amount AS maxAmount, description, is_active AS isActive FROM financial_product WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.update: UPDATE financial_product SET product_category = #{product.productCategory}, product_name = #{product.productName}, base_interest_rate = #{product.baseInterestRate}, max_interest_rate = #{product.maxInterestRate}, min_duration_months = #{product.minDurationMonths}, max_duration_months = #{product.maxDurationMonths}, min_amount = #{product.minAmount}, max_amount = #{product.maxAmount}, description = #{product.description}, is_active = #{product.isActive} WHERE product_id = #{product.productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_processing_log (task_id, member_id, action_type, processing_note, created_at) VALUES (#{log.taskId}, #{log.memberId}, #{log.actionType}, #{log.processingNote}, NOW())

INSERT INTO product_subscription (user_id, product_id, task_id, amount, duration_months, status, created_at) VALUES (#{sub.userId}, #{sub.productId}, #{sub.taskId}, #{sub.amount}, #{sub.durationMonths}, 'ACTIVE', NOW())
